mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO match_review (
reviewno, matchno, writer_no, target_no,
dog_score, dog_comment,
owner_score, owner_comment,
manner_delta,
content, rdate
) VALUES (
match_review_seq.NEXTVAL,
#{matchno}, #{writer_no}, #{target_no},
#{dog_score}, #{dog_comment},
#{owner_score}, #{owner_comment},
#{manner_delta},
#{content}, SYSDATE
)
mapper.select:
SELECT
r.reviewno, r.matchno,
r.writer_no, r.target_no,
r.dog_score, r.dog_comment,
r.owner_score, r.owner_comment,
r.content, r.rdate,
m.nickname AS writer_nickname
FROM match_review r
INNER JOIN member m ON r.writer_no = m.memberno
WHERE r.matchno = #{matchno}
ORDER BY r.reviewno DESC

SELECT
r.reviewno, r.matchno,
r.writer_no, r.target_no,
r.dog_score, r.dog_comment,
r.owner_score, r.owner_comment,
r.content, r.rdate,
m.nickname AS writer_nickname, tm.nickname AS target_nickname,
p.title AS match_title
FROM match_review r
INNER JOIN member m ON r.writer_no = m.memberno
INNER JOIN member tm ON r.target_no = tm.memberno
INNER JOIN match_post p ON r.matchno = p.matchno
WHERE r.target_no = #{target_no}
ORDER BY r.rdate DESC

SELECT
reviewno, matchno,
writer_no, target_no,
dog_score, dog_comment,
owner_score, owner_comment,
content, rdate
FROM match_review
WHERE reviewno = #{reviewno}

SELECT
r.reviewno, r.matchno,
r.writer_no, r.target_no,
r.dog_score, r.dog_comment,
r.owner_score, r.owner_comment,
r.content, r.rdate,
m.nickname AS writer_nickname, tm.nickname AS target_nickname, p.title AS match_title
FROM match_review r
LEFT OUTER JOIN member m ON r.writer_no = m.memberno LEFT OUTER JOIN member tm ON r.target_no = tm.memberno LEFT OUTER JOIN match_post p ON r.matchno = p.matchno
WHERE r.writer_no = #{memberno} OR r.target_no = #{memberno}
ORDER BY r.rdate DESC
